'''chakana''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:feasibility|feasibility]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-k-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:feasibility|feasibility]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| chakana
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:chækænæth|chækænæth]] || [[word:chækænæj|chækænæj]] || [[word:chækænæsh|chækænæsh]] || [[word:chækænæ|chækænæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:chakakanath|chakakanath]] || [[word:chakakanaj|chakakanaj]] || [[word:chakakanash|chakakanash]] || [[word:chakakana|chakakana]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:chakanath|chakanath]] || [[word:chakanaj|chakanaj]] || [[word:chakanash|chakanash]] || [[word:chakana|chakana]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:chakafnafth|chakafnafth]] || [[word:chakafnafj|chakafnafj]] || [[word:chakafnafsh|chakafnafsh]] || [[word:chakafnaf|chakafnaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chakanatha|chakanatha]] || [[word:chakanaja|chakanaja]] || [[word:chakanasha|chakanasha]] || [[word:chakanaka|chakanaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chakanath|chakanath]] || [[word:chakanaj|chakanaj]] || [[word:chakanash|chakanash]] || [[word:chakana|chakana]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chakanathal|chakanathal]] || [[word:chakanajal|chakanajal]] || [[word:chakanashal|chakanashal]] || [[word:chakanakal|chakanakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chakanaathatha|chakanaathatha]] || [[word:chakanaajaja|chakanaajaja]] || [[word:chakanaashasha|chakanaashasha]] || [[word:chakanaaka|chakanaaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chakanathan|chakanathan]] || [[word:chakanajan|chakanajan]] || [[word:chakanashan|chakanashan]] || [[word:chakanakan|chakanakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chakanathaoro|chakanathaoro]] || [[word:chakanajaoro|chakanajaoro]] || [[word:chakanashaoro|chakanashaoro]] || [[word:chakanakaoro|chakanakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|1e8b6ef}}
